title: Implement data pipeline
original_text: Implemented ETL data pipeline. Added data ingestion from multiple sources. Implemented data transformation and cleaning. Added data validation and quality checks. Implemented data warehousing with Snowflake. Added data orchestration with Airflow. Implemented data lineage tracking. Added pipeline monitoring and alerting. Result: data pipeline operational.
expected_body_lines: - Add data ingestion from multiple sources
- Add data validation and quality checks
- Add orchestration with Airflow and lineage tracking
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(data): implement ETL data pipeline"
